news.headline: 2 cops martyred as speeding dumper crashes into parked police van on M9 Motorway
news.summary:
<p>KARACHI: Two police personnel were martyred on Monday when a speeding dumper truck crashed into a police van parked on the M9 Motorway within the limits of the Gadap City police station, officials said.</p>

news.headline: Hong Kong urged to trigger travel alert to DR Congo, Uganda amid Ebola outbreak
news.summary:
Hong Kong authorities should step up preventive measures and issue a travel alert to warn residents against visiting parts of central Africa as an Ebola outbreak in the DR Congo and Uganda threatens to worsen, an infectious disease expert has said.

news.headline: What to Know About the Latest Ebola Outbreak
news.summary: The World Health Organization declared a global health emergency after about 80 people died from the virus in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

news.headline: ‘Occupational bug’: China surgeon goes viral for weighing 150kg due to work stress, bad diet
news.summary:
A Shanghai doctor has gone viral because he weighs 150kg, with some internet users jokingly asking whether they should follow such a plump person’s prescriptions.

news.headline: France's justice minister to visit Algeria amid diplomatic thaw
news.summary: France's Justice Minister Gérald Darmanin is set to visit Algeria on Monday amid a diplomatic thaw to discuss improving judicial cooperation, including the fate of detained French sports journalist Christophe Gleizes, who was arrested in 2024 for "glorifying terrorism".
